infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Echo uses your camera to take photos of your day so you can match with people sharing similar moments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Echo lets you pick a photo from your library to share as today's moment.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Echo uses your country (not precise location) to celebrate matches with people nearby.

plugins.photosPermission: Echo needs access to your photo library so you can share a photo of today.
plugins.cameraPermission: Echo needs your camera so you can take a photo of today.
Echo needs your camera so you can take a photo of today.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Echo uses your country (not precise location) to celebrate matches with people nearby.
